title: helichrysum gossypinum
intro: Helichrysum gossypinum, also known as yellow everlasting or strawflower, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and silvery-gray leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum gossypinum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum gossypinum include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
